name: Blintzes with Fresh Peach Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the creamed cottage cheese and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Heat lightly oiled 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Briefly warm a tortilla, turning once, just until soft.
3. Portion the cheese mixture into the center of each tortilla. Place a few peach slices on top. Fold in two sides to partially cover the filling. Roll up tightly to enclose the filling and create a rectangular package. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
4. Add a small amount of oil to the skillet if needed. Heat the filled tortillas over medium-low heat until browned on all sides. Serve with warm Fresh Peach Sauce.
FRESH PEACH SAUCE: In a saucepan, combine water, sugar, and lemon juice. Bring to a boil, then continue boiling uncovered for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the peaches.
